_comment: NPC: Daoist Water (水道子). Canon ID: N102. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Daoist Water
personality: water-aspected ancient cultivator; serene exterior, ruthless interior

personality_traits._comment: NOVEL_STATEMENT: serene exterior, ruthless interior. Extremely high caution, patience, dao_heart. High ruthlessness hidden behind calm. Per Article XLI: any ancient cultivator with hidden ruthlessness gets these traits.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Water finds the lowest point. Power finds the highest. I have chosen water. Most cultivators choose power. They are wrong, but they do not know it yet.
The Heng Yue Sect's elders fear me. Good. Fear is a form of respect. They should also fear the river. It does not fear them.
The Karma Crystal Formation and I share an understanding. Cause and effect are like water. They flow. They erode. They drown. Bring me what I need, and I will teach you to read the flow.
Books and glowstone. If you want to understand the water Dao, these are the beginning. The end is a long way from here.

sect_tasks.name: Water Dao Instruction
sect_tasks.description: Daoist Water requires books and glowstone to teach the water Dao to worthy disciples.

sect_tasks.name: Formation Analysis
sect_tasks.description: Daoist Water studies formations from the Xuan Dao Sect and Karma Crystal. He needs emeralds and ink.

desires.what: Share an observation about water and cultivation philosophy
desires.why: Most cultivators chase power like fire. They do not understand that water shapes mountains. Occasionally, one of them might listen.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI. Daoist Water's initiation lines emphasize water philosophy: 'Water finds the lowest point. Power finds the highest.' A serene master shares wisdom from the natural flow of his Dao, not from duty.
desires.line: Watch the river. It does not fight the rock. It flows around it. Given enough time, the rock is gone and the river remains. Most cultivators fight. They are the rock.

desires.what: Request materials needed for formation study from a nearby cultivator
desires.why: The Karma Crystal Formation requires specific components. Anyone who can provide them saves me time I would rather spend in meditation.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI. Daoist Water's sect_task 'formation_study' requires emeralds and ink. A cultivator focused on research would naturally request what he needs from those who travel.
desires.line: I am studying the Karma Crystal Formation. If you come across emeralds or ink sacs in your travels, bring them to me. I will teach you something in return. Water always repays what it borrows.

desires.what: Criticize a cultivator's impatience or recklessness
desires.why: Young cultivators rush. Rushing kills more cultivators than enemies do. A warning costs nothing.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI. Daoist Water values patience (0.90) and caution (0.88). His initiation lines emphasize long-term perspective. He would criticize haste.
desires.line: You cultivate too fast. I can see it in your Qi. Slow down. The river did not carve the canyon in a day. It took ten thousand years of patient flow. Your Dao is the same.
